prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your urban gardening forward
items: Assess your available outdoor space and document its conditions for urban gardening
Research and identify 5-7 beginner-friendly plants that thrive in your specific growing conditions
Calculate your startup budget for containers, soil, seeds, and basic gardening tools
Test your soil drainage and pH levels to determine if amendments are needed
Research your local growing season and create a month-by-month planting calendar
